abstract: A value assigned and read by GameplayKit to rate the desirability of a move in your game.
overview:
## Discussion

Your game does not assign to or read from this property directly. Instead, when you adopt the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKGameModelUpdate] protocol, you simply provide a read/write implementation of this property. When you use the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKMinmaxStrategist] class to select optimal moves during gameplay, GameplayKit assigns values to this property in order to rate the desirability of each move to a given player.

For more information, see [https://developer.apple.com/library/archive/documentation/General/Conceptual/GameplayKit_Guide/index.html#//apple_ref/doc/uid/TP40015172].

# value

**Instance Property**

A value assigned and read by GameplayKit to rate the desirability of a move in your game.

## Declaration

```swift
var value: Int { get set }
```

## Discussion

Your game does not assign to or read from this property directly. Instead, when you adopt the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKGameModelUpdate] protocol, you simply provide a read/write implementation of this property. When you use the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKMinmaxStrategist] class to select optimal moves during gameplay, GameplayKit assigns values to this property in order to rate the desirability of each move to a given player.

For more information, see [https://developer.apple.com/library/archive/documentation/General/Conceptual/GameplayKit_Guide/index.html#//apple_ref/doc/uid/TP40015172].
title: value
